claims.claim: Vapi budget diagram: ASR 300ms, LLM 200-900ms, TTS 400ms
claims.found: waveform -> ASR 300 ms -> LLM 200-900 ms !! -> TTS 400 ms -> waveform

claims.claim: STT ~300ms and TTS ~400ms roughly fixed; LLM is variable/dominant 200-900ms
claims.found: ASR/TTS are roughly fixed (~300/~400 ms); the LLM is the variable, dominant term (200-900 ms)

claims.claim: Vapi prose: ASR/TTS optimized by providers; bottleneck almost always the LLM, specifically time-to-first-meaningful-sentence
claims.found: ASR (STT) and TTS are fairly optimized by providers. The bottleneck is almost always the LLM — specifically time-to-first-meaningful-sentence.

claims.claim: Together rule of thumb LLM majority > TTS > STT for latency and cost
claims.found: Latency + cost budget split (rough): LLM majority > TTS > STT (both latency and cost). Raw transcript: 'the LLM is going to take up a majority of it followed by TTS followed by speech to text both from a latency and a cost perspective.'

claims.claim: S2S models collapse STT+LLM+TTS into one forward pass; not yet production-ready for tool-calling
claims.found: raw transcript: 'The reason why most of these models are not used in production too much is because they... still have trouble with instruction following and tool calling.'

claims.claim: ElevenLabs orchestration overhead <100ms on top of model times
claims.found: low-latency orchestration engine purpose-built for real-time conversations, adding less than 100ms of overhead
Conversational flow breaks when latency exceeds ~1200ms ... strict 1200ms latency budget per turn

claims.claim: Cross-note links (LAT-02/05/06/09/10/11) referenced as supporting neighbors
claims.found: Note only points to neighbors for elaboration; does not assert they prove a specific fact. Not spot-checked; no load-bearing assertion.

summary: All checkable source figures verified against ground truth. Vapi budget split (300/200-900/400), the LLM-as-bottleneck prose, Together's 'LLM majority > TTS > STT' ordering (confirmed verbatim in raw transcript), S2S tool-calling caveat, ElevenLabs <100ms overhead, and 1200ms budget all match. No code_refs to check (frontmatter code_refs empty).
